title: Genie interface and file upload enhancements
body:
* **Fixed off-screen color ramp editor in Genie**: Resolved a bug where the color ramp editor was hidden off-screen.
* **Improved file upload security and setup in Genie**: File uploads are now accessible only to the users who uploaded them. Setup is simplified to automatically designate the catalog and schema where the file is stored. See [Upload a file to a Genie Agent](/aws/en/genie/file-upload).

ref_links.text: Upload a file to a Genie Agent
